subject: Customer Relationship Management
question: What is the primary objective of Customer Relationship Management (CRM)?

options.text: Build and maintain long-term customer relationships

reason: CRM focuses on developing and maintaining long-term relationships with customers to improve satisfaction, loyalty, and profitability.
